default_negative_prompt: no morphing, no warping, no identity drift, no extra fingers, no extra limbs, no distorted faces, no text artifacts, no jittery motion, no flickering, no plastic skin, no AI-generated look, no over-saturation, no warping logos

templates.name: Hook — Mascot Reveal
templates.description: Slow push-in reveal of the deepotus mascot emerging from depths. High-retention opener.
templates.subject_pattern: the deepotus character (octopus mascot with bioluminescent details) emerging from deep blue water
templates.action: tentacles slowly unfurl as the character drifts toward camera, glowing eyes opening
templates.setting: abyssal underwater scene, faint sun rays piercing from above, dark cinematic depth

templates.voiceover_script_fr: Depuis les profondeurs... quelque chose s'apprête à émerger.

Deepotus is coming. Are you watching?
templates.caption_pattern_fr:
